title: Makefile: add binary-minimal and binary-static-minimal
body:
These targets produce a pure-Go binary, without the following features:
* ostree
* devicemapper
* btrfs
* gpgme

Signed-off-by: Akihiro Suda <suda.akihiro@lab.ntt.co.jp>

comments.body:
Thanks!

Rather than add 4! duplicate build targets which are likely to be rarely used, and therefore broken from time to time, could this instead be chosen by a `make` variable, so that maybe `make build-local DISABLE_CGO=1` sets the appropriate values of `BUILDTAGS`, and the existing rules continue to be used?
